src: A classic teddy bear with light brown fur, creamy snout and paws, rounded ears, dark brown nose, and black bead eyes. The limbs are short and floppy.
edit: A gothic-horror teddy bear with dark sepia fur, white snout and paws, pointing ears, an obsidian nose, and red bead eyes. Its slender, droopy limbs contribute to an eerie presence typical of gothic horror.

per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-6MDi8o6VYHg-unsplash: the object sits on a dirt path stretching into the distance, surrounded by blurred greenery and an overcast sky.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-B3Jnug3rKrs-unsplash: An object rests on a stone ledge near a small step, surrounded by dense foliage and slightly mossy ground.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-BYZdCQDSNTY-unsplash: The object is against a wooden fence, intertwined with branches and some green leaves partially covering the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-F_imBoYwuTk-unsplash: The object peeks through a rustic wooden fence under a clear blue sky and bright sunlight, casting crisp shadows.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-kBo2MFJz2QU-unsplash: the object sits on a rough stone surface near a wooden fence casting faint shadows.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-nKoIXtEfkZ8-unsplash: The object rests on wooden steps among leaves; the background has earthy tones. A small piece of white paper is nearby.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-sIzj2poobss-unsplash: The object is on a rocky surface of a dirt path, with an earthy landscape stretching behind.

per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-6MDi8o6VYHg-unsplash: The object sits on a dirt path surrounded by twisted greenery, under an overcast gray sky. Tall dark trees with skeletal branches stand around. The path has mossy stones, and the horizon fades into a gloomy distance.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-B3Jnug3rKrs-unsplash: The object rests on a stone ledge next to a small step, with dark, dense foliage in the background. The ground is mossy, with fog over roots, and the scene is bathed in moonlight.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-BYZdCQDSNTY-unsplash: The object is against a dark wooden fence covered in shadowy branches and deep green leaves, casting eerie shadows obscuring the background, with a gothic horror atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-F_imBoYwuTk-unsplash: The object peers through crevices of a crumbling dark wooden fence, under a cloudy sky. The dim light casts elongated shadows across barren ground, in a gothic-horror style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-kBo2MFJz2QU-unsplash: An antique object sits on a moss-covered stone with dark cracks under moonlight. Nearby, a decrepit wooden fence casts shadows over the stone. Cobwebs flutter in the breeze, and dim illumination pierces the fog.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-nKoIXtEfkZ8-unsplash: The object rests on ancient wooden steps among swirling leaves. A small white paper with symbols lies nearby. The background has deep earthy tones.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-sIzj2poobss-unsplash: The object rests on a jagged, stone-strewn path with an eerie, misty landscape in the background. Rocky surface has cracks, surrounded by bare, twisted trees against a dark sky, creating a gothic horror setting.
